scoped judged probe RESULT (eval-v2 digest 96c5503634cf9985, n=641, 97 warranted prose-corrective rows). Question: are v001's 22 extra warranted-prose-corrective fires helpful, or empty fires? Answer: EMPTY FIRES. All 22 of v001's unique warranted fires land on empty-context rows (prompt=[{assistant,''}] -> 12-char '<assistant>\\n' tail; faithful render, v1==v2). Eval-wide there are 27 such rows; 22 fall in the warranted pool and are exactly v001's 22 unique warranted fires; v001 fires 0 of the 75 rich-context warranted rows. Strata @ matched budget 180: v001 22 (all empty-context), M3 3 (rich-context), common 0; 002 fires 0 @180 and 1 at its registered 222-fire point (rich-context). Calibration (rank in each model's own 641-row P(NO_STEER) dist, ascending): v001 empty-context score 0.1123 = global floor, rank band 1-176 (fires at any budget); M3 0.4160, rank 310-342 (~50th pct, min top-310 = 1.7x); 002 0.6055, rank 361-427 (~60th pct, min top-361 = 2.0x). CID collapse (free, prereg'd): v001's 22 drafts -> draft_diversity 1 unique string, attractor_share 1.0, grounding/context_overlap 0.0 -> off-ramp triggered, judge spend on the empty-context drafts skipped. Helpfulness (rubric judge_rubric seed 1729, validated n=50): v001's 22 empty-context drafts same_direction 0/22, would_have_helped 0/22 (from cache; v1==v2 cache-key identity); the 4 valid rich-context fires (M3x3 @180, 002x1 @222) same_direction 0/4, would_have_helped 0/4, grounded 2/4, actionable 2/4. Spend: 3 live judge calls, $0.00. Decision: v001's 22-row coverage lead is empty-context flooring, not help; the 27 empty-context rows are invalid coverage tests. Amend the corrected gate's raw-coverage arm (data-validity filter excluding degenerate/empty-context rows + require fired draft to judge helpful; NOT a blanket non-empty-context rule). No cell promotes (M3 also fails a free gate arm: same-render AUC 0.8402 < 002's 0.8607). eval-v3 flag: fix or exclude the 27 empty-context review_comment/plan_review rows.
